metadata.title: Relugolix Therapy
metadata.indication: Relugolix for advanced hormone-sensitive prostate cancer.
metadata.partial_assessment_note: Any independently actionable entered value is assessed; omitted domains remain explicitly unassessed and never block a partial result.

clinical_governance.prescriptive_authority: Treatment plan must be initiated by the appropriately qualified Consultant specified in the NCCP source.
clinical_governance.dose_modification_note: Any dose modification or non-standard continuation should be discussed with a Consultant.
clinical_governance.disclaimer: Decision-support encoding of the current NCCP source. It does not replace the official NCCP regimen, clinical judgement, local policy, prescribing review or pharmacy verification.

interruption_over_7_days.label: Treatment interrupted for more than 7 days

oral_pgp_inhibitor_unavoidable.label: Oral P-gp inhibitor co-administration is unavoidable

pgp_strong_cyp3a_inducer_unavoidable.label: Combined P-gp and strong CYP3A inducer is unavoidable

renal_band.label: Renal function category
renal_band.assessment_guidance: Select the protocol-specific renal category matching the verified CrCl/eGFR. Exact numerical entry is not required because the NCCP decision is categorical.

output_templates.proceed: No encoded restriction was triggered in the entered domain(s). This is not an overall treatment clearance.
output_templates.coverage_gap: Only entered values were assessed; all omitted clinically relevant domains remain unassessed.
output_templates.consultant_review: The entered value requires protocol-specific clinical review.
output_templates.withhold: Withhold and reassess according to the official NCCP pathway.
output_templates.delay: Delay treatment and reassess according to the official NCCP pathway.

action.message: Restart with a 360 mg loading dose on day 1, followed by 120 mg once daily.

rules.explanation: Restart with a 360 mg loading dose on day 1, followed by 120 mg once daily.

action.message: Administer relugolix first and separate the P-gp inhibitor by at least 6 hours; short interruption up to 2 weeks may be considered.

rules.explanation: Administer relugolix first and separate the P-gp inhibitor by at least 6 hours; short interruption up to 2 weeks may be considered.

action.message: If unavoidable, the NCCP pathway increases relugolix to 240 mg once daily during the combined P-gp/strong CYP3A inducer, then returns to 120 mg once daily after discontinuation; confirm the plan with the treating consultant/pharmacist.

rules.explanation: If unavoidable, the NCCP pathway increases relugolix to 240 mg once daily during the combined P-gp/strong CYP3A inducer, then returns to 120 mg once daily after discontinuation; confirm the plan with the treating consultant/pharmacist.

action.message: Use caution in severe renal impairment or dialysis.

rules.explanation: Use caution in severe renal impairment or dialysis.

action.message: Severe hepatic impairment requires specialist review because the source only confirms no adjustment for mild/moderate impairment.

rules.explanation: Severe hepatic impairment requires specialist review because the source only confirms no adjustment for mild/moderate impairment.

action.message: Assess the QT-prolongation benefit-risk before treatment.

rules.explanation: Assess the QT-prolongation benefit-risk before treatment.

administration.dose: 360 mg loading dose day 1, then 120 mg once daily
administration.instructions: May be taken with or without food; swallow whole. If a dose is >12 hours late, omit it.

treatment.additional_requirement: Continue medical castration unless surgically castrated where specified in the NCCP source.

regular: Disease and safety monitoring according to treatment plan and NCCP source.

supportive_care.mapping_basis: The NCCP regimen classifies this oral SACT as minimal emetogenic risk; the linked oral minimal-to-low supportive-care guidance is used rather than a parenteral prescription sheet.
